creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
See PR 139556, which updates the beecrypt port to version 4.2.1.  
	That version installs beecrypt.so.7, which -- contrary to appearances -- 
	succeeds beecrypt.so.10 from the previous version.

	The attached patch allows rpm5's dependency on beecrypt to satisfied by 
	any installed version.
